label: College assigns campus guide for the intern
observe: Programs and Drives → Internship guides. Find the selected student for the GT- internship. Click Assign guide, enter faculty name, email, and notes, then save.

label: Open Internship guides
observe: Cards list selected and in-progress interns on your campus.

label: Assign campus guide — manual
observe: Enter guide name, department, email, and notes for the student. Save updates the card.

label: Employer assigns company supervisor
observe: Student Opportunities → Internship supervisors for selected or in-progress interns.

label: Open Internship supervisors
observe: Intern cards for your company; Assign supervisor opens the contact form.

label: Assign company supervisor — manual
observe: Enter supervisor name, team or role, email, phone, and notes for the intern.

label: Open Internship Progress Reviews
observe: Table of selected interns; Add or Edit opens employer feedback form. Student feedback shows read-only when present.

label: Submit employer internship progress review — manual
observe: Optional star rating plus feedback text of at least ten characters.

label: Student opens Internship Progress Reviews
observe: Campus guide and company supervisor blocks appear when assigned. Submit student feedback on the same page.

label: Navigate to Internship Progress Reviews
observe: Selected internship card with guide, supervisor, and feedback form.

label: Submit student internship progress review — manual
observe: Star rating optional; feedback text at least ten characters.

label: College reviews internship progress review (read-only)
observe: Internship Outcomes → Internship Progress Reviews. Table shows student and employer submissions; Export CSV available.

label: Open Internship Progress Reviews
observe: Rows appear after at least one side submits feedback.

label: Verify guide card shows company supervisor
observe: On Internship guides, the same intern card shows campus guide you assigned and employer supervisor read-only.
